meta.name: 12 PACES JOE
meta.desc: A short (Unfinished) platformer I made to test out a few features. Will add more stuff later.

meta.name: 15 MINUTES TO LIVE
meta.desc:
The year is 20XX. Ageing is a thing of the past, and all humans have predetermined lifespans, shown by digital clocks embedded in their arm. Time can be bought, sold, or traded - just like a currency.
You are Vance Anderson. Your lifespan has just been stolen. You have 15 minutes to live... unless you can find whoever is responsible.
Created in 48 hours for Ludum Dare 44.

meta.name: 2 PLAYER BOMBERMAN
meta.desc: Un juego estilo Bomberman de dos jugadores

meta.name: 8 BIT PANDA
meta.desc: 8 Bit Panda es un plataformero clásico en el que puedes moverte, correr, saltar y obtener powerups. Tiene 17 niveles distribuidos por 6 islas.

meta.name: A BLOBFISH OUT OF WATER
meta.desc: Run as Blobster the blobfish to reach the ocean (If there is one...).

meta.name: A CLICKER
meta.desc: The title says it all... You press "A (or Z on the keyboard... if you have one.)" a lot! Cool, huh? I even made a very basic upgrade system! Press "B (or X)" when you have enough Clicks! Tha-- that's it.

meta.name: AIR HOCKEY
meta.desc: Scoring 7 points

meta.name: AMROGUE
meta.desc: The Goons are chasing you down as you decend through the depths of the Place. You'll find various items and chests to help on your journey below. How far down can you make it before they get to you?

meta.name: ANT RACER
meta.desc: An infinite rally runner made for Slovak rally team red ants.

meta.name: ARK2KS ARITHMETIC
meta.desc:
Just do some really easy calculation,you will get mark A.
No integral or differential calculation,don't worry.

meta.name: ASPRIN
meta.desc: Collect dots dodge lines

meta.name: ASTEROIDS
meta.desc: A remaster of the classic asteroids game from atari

p: BALLOON AND CACTUS A LOVE STORY.tic
n: BALLOON AND CACTUS A LOVE STORY

meta.name: BALLOON AND CACTUS A LOVE STORY
meta.desc:
How long can you help Balloon survive in the thorniest of relationships?
Inflated list of features:
- Carefully float Balloon into hugs while avoiding the deadly arms of Cactus!nn- Avoid the ever-closing walls of Cactus's crush!nn- Mumble puns about balloons and cacti nobody will hear!
Balloon and Cactus was built with TIC-80 as an example for a teens' game-making workshop at Fort Vancouver Regional Library!

meta.name: BALLOON PUNCH
meta.desc: An old school seesaw game

meta.name: BALMUNG
meta.desc: Explore an island filled with monsters and mysteries!

meta.name: BARE BONES
meta.desc: Journey through Dr. Zilog's dungeon of discarded creations. Solve puzzles, fight bizarre creatures, rebuild your body and finally take your revenge on the mad scientist responsible for all this mess in this Zelda inspired dungeon-crawler.

meta.name: BATTLE
meta.desc: Fight with a friend by throwing magic spears!

meta.name: BEJEWELED
meta.desc: Minimal Bejeweled Clone

meta.name: BINARY ROAD
meta.desc:
This is a very simple one key jump game.
Don't fall into the pitfalls.

meta.name: BIRD JUMPER
meta.desc: You're falling for some reason. land on the birds to get points and make combos!

meta.name: BITMAZE
meta.desc: A simple maze game with randomly spawning objective. Collect the coin 20 times to win.

meta.name: BLAST-80
meta.desc: Defend the earth from a horde of incoming comets. The spawn rate of the comets will increase as you progress. How far can you make it before our planet meets its doom.

meta.name: BLOCK WALK
meta.desc: A game created for the 2018 GMTK Game Jam.

meta.name: BLUES DANCE SHOW
meta.desc:
A rhythmic game better than Dance Revolution!
When an arrow is inside the score box, press the corresponding directional button to earn points. To unlock the next level, you must get at least 80% 'good' and 'excellent' in your final score.

meta.name: BOOM BUSHES
meta.desc: A simple endless game, try to avoid enemies and not blow yourself up.

meta.name: BOUNCELOT
meta.desc: As a living ball, bounce on the walls and over the people to make it as high as you can before the time runs out. Hurry up!

meta.name: BREAKOUT-TEST
meta.desc: Simple breakout game to test out TIC-80.

meta.name: BRICKGAME
meta.desc:
A mini-collection of arcade games from the popular console of the 1990s - the Brick Game Classic.
nnGames list:nn1. Tetrisnn2. Racingnn3. Breakoutnn4. Snakenn5. Space Shooter Game

meta.name: CALL OF THE TREES
meta.desc: You are a tree in this exciting top-down maze game. Art and design by a 6-year-old. Can you rescue the baby trees?

meta.name: CANDYTIC
meta.desc:
A TIC-80 version of Candy Crash. Without levels, just try to make the best score.
Now with all the special candies and combos.
When there are no more possible moves, the game is reset, but the record is saved. Try to break it!nnUse the arrows to move and Z to select.

meta.name: CANT STOP
meta.desc: Dice rolling board game 1-4 players, with AI.

meta.name: CAP HELL
meta.desc:
Beer is Z.
Wine is X.
Put caps on the bottle!!

meta.name: CAULIFLOWER POWER
meta.desc: Since the ancient times, the humanity knew very well about the exceptional values of the cauliflower plant: nutritional, medicinal, or aesthetic. Some even went as far as to claim it can ward off demonic spirit, boosts the intellectual power, or becomes a decent booze if you know what to do. Yet only in 2027, in a sudden flash of enlightenment, Dr. P.Golabek of CDDA Labs realized the true potential hidden in the unloved part of his meal. There was more to the boiled curd of the brassica oleracea than what it seemed on the surface. The discovery didn't go unnoticed, and instead of bringing prosperity and nutrition, the wondrous plant became outlawed along with significant number of unrelated species of brassicaceae family. The time has come to put an end to it and let the cauliflower bloom everywhere! Welcome to the Cauliflower Research Liberation Front, comrade!

meta.name: CELESTE
meta.desc: Un simple pero desafiante plataformero con 8 niveles.

meta.name: CHARACTER GENERATOR SHOOTING
meta.desc:
Character Generator Shooting game.
Press 'A' to start the game.
Move with the cursor keys and use the Z/X keys for shooting.

meta.name: CITY BUILDING SIMILUATOR
meta.desc:
Build a city.
The Goal is to Advance to the end of level 3 (the blue bar) with as many sets of four colors as possible (one of each). Each human will have a different color assigned to them.
By building blue schools, you can increase the speed of advancement. Gold Mines will increase your gold production rate.
The population will increase over time and people need more food, causing your hunger bar (green) to decrease more rapidly. If your hunger bar drops to zero, three random citizens will be eaten.
You can build green houses to prevent that. Or... you can sacrifice your citizens for food.
Which citizen is most valuable to you? Make your choice.

meta.name: CLICKER
meta.desc: A cookie clicker.

meta.name: COMETS
meta.desc: Oh no! You're trapped inside a swarm of comets! You have no other option but to shoot them if you want to survive - But what's that? You can only rotate on an 8-directional axis? Well, that will make aiming somewhat harder... Will you survive anyway?nnThis is a game about shooting comets (or asteroids, alright).

meta.name: CONWAYS GAME OF LIFE
meta.desc:
This cartridge is a demonstration of Conway's Game of Life.
Gamepad instructions:nn1) Xbox A button or Z: Toggle cell states continuously. Hold down the button for creating a line of toggled cells. Only in Edit Mode.
2) Xbox B button or X: Switch between Play Mode and Edit Mode.
3) Xbox X button or A: Resets the game.
4) Xbox Y button or S: Toggle a cell state one with each button press. Only in Edit Mode.

meta.name: COOKIE CLICKER THE FIRST VERSION
meta.desc:
Click the cookie to get more cookies!
A Classic Cookie Clicker, simply remade on TIC-80.
UPGRADES:
Auto Clicker: Gives you 1 cookie per second.
Super Click: Increases your cookies per click by 1.
Luck: Increases your chances of getting a lucky click, giving you 5 times the cookies for that click.

meta.name: COOKIE CLICKER
meta.desc:
This game clicker is a copy of the original browser game Cookie Clicker. The goal in this game is to collect as many cookies as possible and improve the pumping level to the highest level. For this, you can either just invite a lot of cookies, or pump the furnace to the maximum level in this game. 
There are 3 improvements: the cursor, which increases the number of cookies produced per click, the lucky cursor, which increases the chance of Golden cookies falling down (which gives several times more cookies than normal), and another furnace, which gives a small number of cookies per second.

meta.name: COOL AND NEW RPG
meta.desc:
You go on quest to find death in innocent creatures.
Is a parody edit :)

meta.name: CPONG
meta.desc:
Single player circular pong.
Left/right arrows move clockwise/counter-clockwise.
Try to keep the ball within the circle as long as possible.

meta.name: CRAB RUN
meta.desc: Un jueguito bobo de carreras. Tu personaje corre, aparecen cangrejos que debes saltarlos con el botón (z).

meta.name: CROCO CRAZE
meta.desc:
Clone of the popular Hasbro game.
Try to get all of the teeth without getting bit!
It's best to play this with at least 2 friends!
Use the top-row (Q to backslash) keys to touch the teeth.
You can also press Shift+E on the title screen to erase the stats.

meta.name: CUBES CHARMER
meta.desc: Cubes Charmer is a platformer/puzzler in which you have to collect games in order to open the central door. To progress in the world, you will have to use cubes in various ways.
meta.genre: Plataformas / Corre y Salta con desplazamiento

meta.name: CURSE OF KILDREN
meta.desc: A Zelda-like adventure.

meta.name: DEADLY SKELTONS
meta.desc: A tower-defense game, with bonus stabbing and bonus exploding. Stop the skeletons from reaching your core using a knife, and a bomb, and many, many turrets. It's a remake of an MFGJ game from last year, that wasn't very good. Hopefully, this one's better!

meta.name: DOOR
meta.desc: A reinvented board game for two players. Hold S for help.

meta.name: DOORS OF DOOM
meta.desc: Explore the dungeon with an infinite number of locked doors! More than 23 monsters to fight and like 40 or so different items! Craft new stuff between a fight and the next to help in your quest! Combat items, dressable items, fancy panties, and much more!

meta.name: DOUBLE SIDED
meta.desc:
A small game made for the Weekly Game Jam #56. Control two characters at once, with some small but important twists:
-The walking is mirrored (one of the characters going left means the other going right);
-The jump buttons are individual for each character.
Far from being a masterpiece, but still, I'm getting better :)

meta.name: DREAS UP
meta.desc: 8-bit dress-up. If you like to show it off press F8. You can then crop out the outside bounds and make the background transparent before uploading it.

meta.name: DUNGEON WALKER
meta.desc: Take a walk in the dungeon.

meta.name: EDEN THE FOX PROTOTYPE BETA
meta.desc:
A Run 'N' Jump game.
nnInspired by TehShadowz's Run run run.
nnPress Up to Jump.
Press Down to Duck.

meta.name: ENTROPIPES GRAPHICS MOD
meta.desc: EntroPipes is a puzzle-type game. Simply connect all pipes.

meta.name: ENTROPIPES
meta.desc: EntroPipes is a puzzle-type game. Simply connect all pipes.

meta.name: EVERDAWN
meta.desc: Welcome to Everdawn, a tiny island where the sun and moon have ceased to move through the sky. Explore it, learn its history, and unlock the secrets behind its strange curse.

meta.name: EVOLUTION
meta.desc:
A simulation of small creatures that struggle to survive.
Each being has a DNA that determines its attributes (like hp, strength, speed) and appearance.
When they reproduce, the DNA of the parents mixes to create the DNA of the children, more or less a mutation.
When they meet another of the same sex, they fight to the death.
And they eat grass to recover their health.
nnClick a creature to see its attributes.
Use the up and down arrows to accelerate and decelerate the simulation.

meta.name: EYESOUL
meta.desc:
This is Eyesoul.
Slide and bounce around while shooting demons!nnnnControls:nnarrow-keys/d-pad: movennz-key/A-button: firenna-key/X-button: pausenns-key/Y-button: switch song

meta.name: FIRST GAME
meta.desc: A game for learning how to use a keyboard without looking at your hands.

meta.name: FLAPPY BIRD TEST
meta.desc: Just a fun test!

meta.name: FLAPPY BIRD TIC EDITION
meta.desc: A clone of Flappy Bird. Note: You can change the thickness of the pipe by changing psize to 6.

meta.name: FLAPPY BIRD
meta.desc: Flappy Bird in TIC-80.

meta.name: FLIPPY
meta.desc:
A flappy bird-style game where you have to guide an arrow between the wall gaps.
WARNING: Contains flashing images that may trigger seizures and epilepsy

meta.name: FLOCK BLOCK
meta.desc: Winter is coming and there is an overpopulation of ducks in the south. It's your job to shoot them down before they get there! Be careful, allow 10 ducks to pass and it's game over.

meta.name: FLOWER FARM
meta.desc: It's a flower farm. Plant flowers and harvest them!

meta.name: FLUFFY BALLOON
meta.desc:
This is a leisurely one-key balloon game.
Let's avoid birds.

meta.name: FPS80 CHEAT VERSION
meta.desc: Shoot the monsters, collect powerups, find the keys to open the locked doors and escape the dungeons!

meta.name: FPS80
meta.desc: Shoot the monsters, collect powerups, find the keys to open the locked doors and escape the dungeons!

meta.name: FROGGER
meta.desc: Do you remember Frogger from the Atari 2600 port? NOW!nnKEEP ATARI FROGGER - port at TIC-80!!

meta.name: GAMETEST
meta.desc: A vertical shooting game for TIC-80.

meta.name: GENIUS
meta.desc: Fan-made tribute to the Simon electronic game. Genius was the name of Simon in Brazil. No sprites. No map. Only code.

meta.name: GENJUUMIN SHOOTING
meta.desc: Score Attack Game.

meta.name: GHOSTNCOIN
meta.desc: Take 20 coins before the ghost does!

meta.name: GIAH
meta.desc: Slam into walls, and get paid.

meta.name: GOOGLE DINO
meta.desc: Google Dino in TIC 80.

meta.name: GRAVITRON EXPERIMENT
meta.desc: A simple and small game where you control gravity, made for the 2D Platformer Jam.

meta.name: GRUNIOZERCA - CARROT HUNT
meta.desc: Unofficial port of home-brew game "Gruniozerca" to TIC-80. "Gruniozerca" is a Polish neologism that means "Grunio the eater" (Grunio is the main character's name). In this game, you have to catch carrots, but carrots have four colors and you must change the color of the character to catch them.

meta.name: GUESS THE NUMBER
meta.desc:
Guess the number of 1 to 99.
To switch the language, press the button on the side.

meta.name: GUSDRAW
meta.desc: A simple drawing program made in 20 minutes or so. It has actual line completion.

meta.name: HELLO KITTYS MAZE
meta.desc:
If you love Hello Kitty, then you will certainly love this cute game a lot.
This supercute maze game comes in several sizes. Use the arrow keys to move. Try to collect all the ribbons in the maze before reaching the exit.
Do not get lost in this supercute maze game!

meta.name: HERBERT THE GHOST
meta.desc:
A game made for a friend.
Get coins, avoid bats. Z to dash, X to increase your score in case of an unreachable coin.

meta.name: HI-EX
meta.desc:
A Battle of the Bits Game Jam 3 entry.
Run around and blow up the enemies.
Try not to die! 64 stages of action!
Avoid the perils of fire, enemies, and recoil!
Your gun is super-powerful, but it has a major kick.

p: I WONDER IF I HAD A YOUNGER SISTER.tic
n: I WONDER IF I HAD A YOUNGER SISTER

meta.path: ./I WONDER IF I HAD A YOUNGER SISTER.tic
meta.name: I WONDER IF I HAD A YOUNGER SISTER
meta.desc:
I Wonder if I Had a Sister is a fanart danmaku game using characters from three sister-themed animes:nnUmaru in HimoutonnSagiri in Eromanga SenseinnShana in Shakugan no Shana
This game is inspired by Undertale.

meta.name: IMPOSSIBLE FPS80
meta.desc: Shoot the monsters, collect powerups, find the keys to open the locked doors and escape the dungeons!

meta.name: IMPOSSIBLE PONG
meta.desc: A pong game made to troll people. You can't beat the AI (wink wink).

meta.name: INDIANA JONES 1
meta.desc:
This game is a remake of a text adventure game for ZX-spectrum that was created by Czech programmer Frantisek Fuka (Fuxoft) in the year 1985.
nnControls:nn- mouse for selecting commands and objects from listnn- arrows for quick access to north, south, west and east directionsnnnnDo not give up easily. There are lots of death traps, places you can get stuck when using items incorrectly, and some red herrings. The game can be completed in more than one way! You get your score and number of turns at the end when you get to the finish room. Have fun!

meta.name: JETPAC
meta.desc: An endless space arcade game. Avoid the falling meteors and kill the aliens. See how long you can last!

meta.name: KATZU
meta.desc:
You're a cat and your goal is to have fun!nnThat's basically it! Just play around with this little ball of wool.
You just need to push it to the needle at the end of the level.
Oh... and don't forget about the lava, cacti, and puzzles!

meta.name: KIRBONG
meta.desc: This is a primitive pong game. The pong ball is Kirby.

meta.name: KITTY GUYS KEYBOARD TRAINING
meta.desc: In this game, you learn to type on the keyboard. It's like Typing Agent, but even better.

meta.name: KOMET
meta.desc:
You are a comet. Get bigger, avoid stars and black holes.
This game was made for GDQ One Mechanic Game Jam 4.

meta.name: LANDER
meta.desc: Reimplementation of the Lander game with limited fuel.

meta.name: LANDING
meta.desc:
This is a moon landing game.
The lander jets with the arrow keys.
You should land slowly on the bottom of the crater.

meta.name: LAVENDER WOODS
meta.desc:
Monnet is lost in Lavender Woods...
nnMonnet finds herself lost in the woods after wandering in against her mother's warning. Now she is on an epic adventure to get back, all the while taking time to explore the 9 unique areas of the Lavender Woods, capture slime, and collect treasures.
nnOn her way back though, she must also be careful not to run into any un-netted slime and to avoid the puddles of ooze they leave about, or she may get her clothes dirty —inviting trouble when she gets home.
nnCarefully balance the order you catch slime, collect un-matchable objects (such as rocks and gems), navigate back through areas, and explore to maximize your score and fun!

meta.name: LCD TETRIS
meta.desc:
A mod of Ticris by AlKau.
Mostly just art, but some added things there.

meta.name: LEVEL DOWN
meta.desc:
Level the field.
Click on the numbers to reduce horizontal and vertical lines.
There should be only 1! Actually, no, there should be only zeroes!

meta.name: LIGHTS OFF
meta.desc:
A clone of "Lights Out", Click the lights to toggle them... Try to turn off all the lights! 24 Levels! Every level is GUARANTEED solvable!
RESTART: resets the current level
HOME: goes back to the menu (but keeps your progress)
NOTE: this game uses mouse/touch

meta.name: LOST IN SPACE
meta.desc:
The spaceship of Capitan Pinny crashed on the planet of robots!
Help him find all parts of the ship and leave the planet!

meta.name: M3
meta.desc:
A Match-3 Game.
Keep that combo!
Z - Select
X - Adjust Sound

meta.name: MAINFIGHTER GRAPHICS MOD
meta.desc: In MainFighter, you play a fighter in a planet's atmosphere. Your goal is to defeat all enemy spacecraft to win that bet you made with Droid X2 yesterday. This game was originally made for #FC_JAM 2 in 2017.

meta.name: MAINFIGHTER
meta.desc: In MainFighter, you play a fighter in a planet's atmosphere. Your goal is to defeat all enemy spacecraft to win that bet you made with Droid X2 yesterday. This game was originally made for #FC_JAM 2 in 2017.

meta.name: MARIO BROS
meta.desc: Remake of Nintendo's arcade classic.

meta.name: MARIO
meta.desc: Woah its mario bro!!

meta.name: MINECRAFT
meta.desc:
Minecraft clone for TIC-80.
FEATURES:
1.) 33 unique blocks!
2.) Day-Night cycle!
3.) 3 different types of weather!
4.) Easter eggs!*
5.) A sword for no reason!
6.) Your creativity!
7.) FUN!!**
So why not play today?
* One block is my face.
**Fun is not a guarantee.

meta.name: MINERS
meta.desc: Fun game! Get a pickaxe and mine!

meta.name: MINESWEEPER
meta.desc: Clone del busca minas de MS Windows 3.1.

meta.name: MOUZI II
meta.desc:
Mouzi II : The Return
Kill all the Nazis playing as a brave lab rat!

meta.name: NEWTOTOTONE
meta.desc: It's a game to catch an apple.

meta.name: NEXUS SPACE
meta.desc: Dodge the spheres inside an infinite tunnel.

meta.name: NIGHTS SCORE ATTACK - TIC-80 VER
meta.desc: Demake of GBA NiGHTS downloadable minigame

meta.name: OSEO
meta.desc: A very simple game where you have to pop balloons with the beak. Every missed balloon is a life lost, you have three lives, try to make your high score!

meta.name: PAINT
meta.desc:
A simple paint tool, also supported on mobile!
Take a screenshot to save.

meta.name: PATATO MAN
meta.desc: ​From one day to another, your head turned into a patato (sic)! Because you are Patrick Atom, a creative chemist, you made a facial antidote. But when you were heating water for blending the antidote to strengthen its effects, the bees stole it! So, you must get it back before your head starts to ferment. Hurry up!

meta.name: POKEMONGOL IGO
meta.desc: In the year 12XX, you are a baskak — tribute collector for the Golden Horde. Serve for three years, bringing the tribute on time, and your name may live through history!

meta.name: POKEY THE GOLDEN HEDGEHOG 2 ALPHA 2
meta.desc: TIC-80's very own parody hedgehog is back for round 2!
meta.genre: Plataformas / Corre y Salta con desplazamiento

meta.name: POKEY THE HEDGEHOG
meta.desc: An infini-runner sonic parody game made for TIC-80.
meta.genre: Plataformas / Corre y Salta con desplazamiento

meta.name: PONY PONG IS ACTUALLY BREAKOUT
meta.desc:
Breakout but with ponies.
This was an entry for 'FEMICOM Game Jam #4 (Make Cute Pong).'
Avoid missing the ball (and hearts) to get a high score.

meta.name: POWDER GAME
meta.desc: A simple powder sandbox.

meta.name: POWDER SANDBOX
meta.desc: A powder sandbox doodle in TIC-80.

meta.name: PROBLEMS
meta.desc: Game created for the Ludum Dare 40. It is a kind of time-management-sokoban hybrid, with some social commentary.

meta.name: PUSH-EM
meta.desc:
Puzzle runner.
A mad dash to push all the buttons!

meta.name: QUEST FOR GLORY
meta.desc: Dive into the dungeon, defeat the evil wizard and recover the amulet of Izramil, to get the eternal glory!

meta.name: RACER-Z
meta.desc: A tribute to Digital Derby Auto Raceway.

meta.name: RAYCAST RACER
meta.desc:
Raycasters have been used for a lot of game styles - Shooters, roguelikes, and even roleplaying games. But have you ever seen a raycast-based racer?
Race against up to seven simultaneously running AI contestants on two staggeringly impressive* raycasting environments.
*All raycasters are impressive. Real 3D effects not included.

meta.name: RAYPORTAL
meta.desc: Well yes. It's portals in raycasting.

meta.name: RC FLIGHT SIMULATOR
meta.desc:
An RC Flight Simulator.
Operation is done with the mouse.
Press the left button to raise the engine throttle.
When you release the button, the throttle gradually goes down.
Press the button to control the engine.
The mouse cursor will be neutral at the center of the screen.
If you lower it from the center of the screen, it will raise it up, then it will go down.
Control the aileron from the center of the screen right or left.

meta.name: REBONDE
meta.desc:
i mak gaem
pls plai and enjoy gam
dis gam i VER GUD, has 8 levl an keys an d flag n lokked bloks dat u need kee 2 opn

meta.name: REBOUND 2 2 REVELATIONS
meta.desc:
It's finally here: REBOUND 2 2!!! The sequel to Rebound 2 that nobody asked for!!!
After the "events" of Rebound 2, our (still?) nameless hero sets out to do another thing. Along the way, he'll encounter more things! Exciting!
Now with 50% more stuff, including:nn- Backtracking!nn- Optional rooms! Some of which may or may not have coins!nn- Final map completion percentage!nn- A bigger map than Rebound 2!nn- Tile animations!nn- Stuff!nn- Super fancy opening splash screen!nn- Optional tutorial area!

meta.name: REBOUND 2 ELECTRIC BOOGALOO
meta.desc:
That... ball... thing... from the smash hit* Rebound is back in a new kinda-sorta Metroidvania style adventure with slightly wonky collision detection! Rebound through 5 different areas in your quest to... uhhh... what was the story I came up with again? No matter. YOU'RE A BALL. DO THE THING WHERE YOU BEAT THE GAME.
nn*Probably not

meta.name: RESCUECOPTER
meta.desc: Rescue all the naked villagers from the evil island, but be careful!

meta.name: RPS
meta.desc:
Rock/Paper/Scissors - "a game of wit and skill"
Entry for A Game By Its Cover jam 2017.

meta.name: RUN, RUN, RUN
meta.desc:
Inspired by the famous Google Chrome's little game.
The control mechanics are a little bit different:
[UP] jump.
[UP (hold)] "long jump", the character takes slightly longer to fall.
[DOWN] slide, useless.
[DOWN (airborne)] small double-jump, kind of inspired by source-engine games, but different.
[DOWN (airborne) (hold)] the character falls faster.

meta.name: SECRET AGENTS
meta.desc: ¡Un juego shoot'em up con soporte para 2 jugadores con 4 niveles llenos de enemigos asquerosos y trampas mortales!

meta.name: SHADOW OVER THE TWELVE LANDS
meta.desc: This is a retro CRPG game where you control a party of adventurers through an epic quest that starts out with a small mistake where you essentially doom the entire world to a decade of disasters. But worry not, because you are going to fix things now and defeat the great evil you unleashed upon the world.
meta.genre: Juego de Rol / RPG de Mazmorras

meta.name: SHEEP RUN
meta.desc: This is a Game Boy-inspired endless runner which features parallax scrolling and a sheep from South Milton.

meta.name: SHREDDER BOY
meta.desc:
Shredder Boy is trying to not run out of space by using the shredder.
Use Arrow-Keys to Move and 'Z' for taking/putting objects.
Keep the left (yellow) platform free, scan packets/documents using the 'computer,' and put expired (red-labeled) packets/documents into the shredder. Put the resulting waste onto the garbage platform and try to not run out of space.
The game ends when not all new documents can arrive because the left (yellow) packets/documents is out of space.

meta.name: SIMON
meta.desc: A very simple implementation of the classic Simon game.

meta.name: SIMPLE SNAKE GAME
meta.desc: A very basic version of snake on the TIC-80.

meta.name: SLIDE COLOR
meta.desc:
A sliding puzzle about customizing color.
- In menu
Use UP and DOWN arrow to navigate, and change values using LEFT and RIGHT arrow. To START the game, navigate cursor to START and press RIGHT arrow.
- In Game
Use Up, DOWN, LEFT, and RIGHT arrow to slide around the color.
If you're win, press Z to play again.

meta.name: SMALL SNAKE
meta.desc: A simple snake clone built for the TIC-80 fantasy computer.

meta.name: SPACE PET RESCUE
meta.desc: You have 60 seconds to save all pets, and yourself on spaceship!

meta.name: SPACE RACE DF-9
meta.desc: Space Race but it actually works. Made by Fubuki [modded by prepkenile].

meta.name: SPACE THING
meta.desc:
Space game with mouse control. Originally for #LDJAM but missed deadline. No sounds. Unfinished.
The code could be useful to learn from. Please just try and understand it rather than just take it.

meta.name: SPACER SHIPER SHOOTER
meta.desc: Classic horizontal shootemup. Has a mode where you also have to dodge lasers that sweep across the screen  by phasing through them.

meta.name: STELE
meta.desc: A short platformer game.

meta.name: STREKO
meta.desc:
A simple game about hungry dragon-fly originally made for Gaminator 17 Jam.
Use up/down arrows to move the wings and z/x to move the body.

meta.name: STRUCTURE MANIA
meta.desc:
Mouse click or drag to add a point to the structure.
nnNearby points are automatically connected.
nnWhen pressure is applied, the structure breaks.

meta.name: SUPER HEXAGON
meta.desc: A clone of the game Super Hexagon by Terry Cavanagh. Includes 3 difficulty modes and a leaderboard. Hold X and DOWN in the title screen to wipe your leaderboard.

meta.name: SUPER MONKEYBALL
meta.desc: Dive into a pixelated paradise where nostalgia meets challenge in this delightful retro adventure! Players control a cheerful monkey inside a vibrant, rolling ball, navigating through a series of brilliantly designed 8-bit levels filled with thrilling obstacles and mind-bending puzzles. Collect bananas to unlock power-ups and customize your monkey as you race against the clock, showcasing your skills on colorful platforms and treacherous twists.

meta.name: SUPERNOVA
meta.desc:
The sun has exploded!nnGet on the cosmic highway and try to survive as long as possible.
nnControls:nnleft/right - steernndown/X - brakennZ - jumpnnnnTIP: execute a long jump to get a nice boost.

meta.name: TAG
meta.desc: A simple 2-player tag game made in a week.

meta.name: TANKS
meta.desc:
Have tank fights with your friend in this simple Tank game! Only having the ability to shoot in 8 directions, you'll approach your opponent accusing him of spawn-camping and playing unfairly while blaming the game for your losses - Even though you know you're simply not skilled enough to beat your opponent. Will YOU win against your friend?
This is a 2-player game - Make sure you've got a friend to play with next to you!

meta.name: TERROR INSTINCT
meta.desc: bargain-bin Tetris Grand Master clone

meta.name: TEXT INVADERS WHITEOUT EDITION
meta.desc: Whiteout Challenge of Text Invaders. The background is less than 1% darker than the characters. Changing a Palette won't work. The Escape Key is forbidden.

meta.name: THE DARK TOWER
meta.desc:
Based on the electronic board game from forever ago, but tweaked into a single-player game.
If you wait at the title screen there are descriptions of the items and tiles.

meta.name: THE HUNT FOR SOME GOLD
meta.desc:
You must get the treasures...I guess.
nnI never explained... but you just need to get a bunch of gold I guess.

meta.name: THE SKY HOUSE
meta.desc:
The Sky House is a small Metroidvania about a flying creature in a flying house.
The game is inspired by REDDER and VVVVVV and takes 30 mins to complete.

meta.name: TIC PONG
meta.desc: A ping pong game for TIC-80.

meta.name: TIC-COMMAND
meta.desc: You command an army through your remote command vehicle. Your goal is to destroy the enemy's commander before his army destroys yours. You have a satellite uplink, radar drones, and a radio link to give orders to your robotic soldiers!

meta.name: TIC-SWEEPER
meta.desc:
This is a Minesweeper clone made for practice for the Gamecodeur Gamejam #7.
There is a secret mode accessible with the "Anokmi code"!
Can you find it?

meta.name: TICARUGA
meta.desc: An Ikaruga demake shmup made for the Demake Jam 2018.

meta.name: TICHESS
meta.desc:
Simple Chess game for TIC with random AI player (empty computer screen) and two Minimax players with stochastic choices on the branching paths and maximum branching set. Second minimax player (angry face) explores the search tree more deeply than the first and should take a while to compute his moves.
Better played with between two human players. Putting two angry computers one against the other is not recommended. AI's may take some time to compute their actions (About 6 minutes for hard AI).

meta.name: TICLINES
meta.desc: A clone/ripoff/tribute to the game Color Lines.

meta.name: TICRIS
meta.desc: A remake of Tetris on TIC-80.

meta.name: TIM and MIT
meta.desc:
TIM & MIT are two special robots.
UNITED, they share the same 16 Kb of T-RAM.
T-RAM: Timeless RAM, quantum static continuum synchronized memory (TM)
TIM & MIT travel back and forward in TIME!
TIM records the work ahead, and then MIT syncs back with TIM!
They are fixing some trouble in a photon-color computer. Your task is to cross through ten corrupted sectors!

meta.name: TITLESCREEN
meta.desc: A silly little RPG.

meta.name: TSNAKE
meta.desc:
This game is made for Ludum Dare 41.
Theme: Combine 2 Incompatible Genres
Type letters to switch the snake's direction.
Game Difficulty = Word Length
Controls: Keyboard

meta.name: TURNS OF WAR
meta.desc:
A turn-based fantasy strategy game! Over 26 levels and 28 unit types! Magic, effects, strategy, and more! Simple one-button interface for seamless play experience on Android!
Tutorial included!

meta.name: UNKNOWN GROUNDS
meta.desc: Submission for LOWREZJAM 2017

meta.name: UNKO HUNTER YAKIU
meta.desc: Score attack game

meta.name: VOGELJAGD
meta.desc:
A game about shooting birds from the sky, inspired by Moorhuhn and Duck Hunt.
Shoot as many birds as you can to reach the highest score possible in 60 seconds!

meta.name: VVVVVV TIC-80 DEMAKE
meta.desc: Wow! A remake of VVVVVV? Never even heard of it! (coughcoughsarcasmcoughcough)nnBut! It's acceptable! Even if it has wonky collisions!nn(TRINKETS AVAILABLE: 2)

meta.name: WALL BALL
meta.desc: Welcome to Wall Ball! +1 point for hitting the top. The ball gets faster every time, try to keep up!

meta.name: WARG
meta.desc: You were thrown to sewers to die. Try to survive as long as you can, using your trusty sword, magic dash skill, and your dexterity.

meta.name: WARM WHEELS
meta.desc:
A car racing game! Play against your friends or some CPU cars!
Three different tracks!

meta.name: WCQ NO 6
meta.desc:
Worst Cheap Quality Shoot 'em up example No.6. 
This game is a simple shoot 'em up.

meta.name: WEST TRADE
meta.desc: A simple trading game for the CGAjam.

meta.name: WESTFARM
meta.desc: A simple-ish farming game for the Grow Jam.

meta.name: WHERES DITTO
meta.desc:
A little game made for the GameJam Pot-au-jeu #2, in which you play Ash, desperately looking for his Ditto lost in nature! And this one has the nasty habit of transforming himself into all the pokemons he encounters on his way...
Will you be able to catch it on time with only 5 pokeballs in your pocket? Good luck !

meta.name: WITCHEM UP
meta.desc: Little witch shoot'em up. Entry for the CGAJAM.

meta.name: WIZARDS
meta.desc: Battle your friend with magic! Duck and jump around your opponent's spells and cast some of your own at them!

meta.name: WORM GAME
meta.desc: Classic worm game created for studying Lua. Use Z to hide/show mesh.

meta.name: YITZI
meta.desc: Es Yahtzee, pero lo llamaron Yitzi.
